Go back to Loansifter lender list: our bridge loan and fix & flip programs we are offering in TX, CO, WA, AZ and NV. In addition to these programs we also offer ground-up construction financing but only in CA at this time.
Outside of CA we do not do any loans above $5M, but in CA we can go up to $10M.
We can structure any broker fee terms you have arranged with a borrower to into the loan and you would be paid out through escrow upon loan closing.
If you have a situation where you would like to keep a broker fee undisclosed, we can work up to 1% into our origination fee and pay you out directly.
For most updated products and policies, please contact the AE.
